authors: Curd B. Knüpfer Yunkang Yang Mike Cowburn a Digital Democracy
raw_title: The Logic of Connective Faction: How Digitally Networked Elites and Hyper-Partisan Media Radicalize Politics
title_en: The Logic of Connective Faction: How Digitally Networked Elites and Hyper-Partisan Media Radicalize Politics
title_zh: 连接性派系的逻辑：数字网络精英与极端党派媒体如何激化政治
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了数字时代政治精英如何通过网络连接，与极端党派媒体合作，加剧政治对立和激进化。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how political elites in the digital age use network connections and collaborate with hyper-partisan media to intensify political polarization and radicalization.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体环境下政治传播的演变，特别是精英网络和媒体结构如何影响政治动态和民主进程。
research_direction_en: Investigating the evolution of political communication in digital media environments, focusing on how elite networks and media structures shape political dynamics and democratic processes.
